name: Ukuhlukaniswa Okuthuthukisiwe
description: Khipha ukuphuka usebenzisa izinto ezitholakalayo ukuze uvimbele ukulimala okwengeziwe, unciphise ubuhlungu, futhi ukhawule ukulahleka kwegazi ezicubu ezizungezile. I-Splint endaweni itholakele ngaphandle uma ukujikeleza kusengozini -- bese uqondisa kahle.
equipment: Omagazini abagoqiwe, izinti, izigxobo zamatende (insimu ethuthukisiwe)
steps: Veza futhi uhlole ukulimala -- hlola ukujikeleza, ukuzwa, ukunyakaza (CSM) kude ukuze kuphuke ngaphambi nangemuva.
Lawula noma yikuphi ukopha okusebenzayo ngaphambi kokuhlukana.
I-Pad bony ivelele ngokukhululekile ukuvimbela izilonda zokucindezela.
Khetha impahla ephothiweyo isikhathi eside ngokwanele ukuthi inganyakazi ilunga ngenhla NAngaphansi kokuphuka.
Isikhundla somlenze endaweni yokunethezeka noma ukuqondanisa kwe-anatomical -- ungaphoqi.
Faka izinto zokunamathisela, bese unamathisela. Vikela ngamabhandeshi noma imichilo yendwangu.
UNGAQONGQWANGA kakhulu -- shiya iminwe/izinzwane zivezwe ukuze ugade i-CSM.
Phinda uhlole i-CSM ngemva kokufaka isicelo -- xegisa ngokushesha uma ukujikeleza konakala.
Phakamisa isitho uma kungenzeka ukunciphisa ukuvuvukala.
warnings: Phinda uhlole i-CSM njalo emizuzwini eyi-15-30 -- ukuvuvukala kungenza i-splint efanele ibe i-tourniquet.
Ukuqhekeka okuvulekile: vala inxeba ngendwangu eyinyumba kuqala, bese ugoqa. UNGABUYI ithambo libuyele phakathi.
Ukuphuka kwe-femur kungalahlekelwa yigazi elingu-1-2L ethangeni -- phatha kabi ukushaqeka.
Okusoleka ukuthi kuphuka umgogodla: ungathuthukisi ukuhlukaniswa -- nciphisa ukunyakaza, gcina ukuzinza okusemgqeni.

pediatric.note: Amapuleti okukhula ezinganeni abuthakathaka kunemigqa -- ukuphuka okusolakalayo ngisho nangendlela encane. Ukuphuka kwe-Torus (ibhande) kungase kube nokuvuvukala okuncane.

obstetric.note: Kusebenza ukuhlukaniswa okujwayelekile. Gwema ukuma okude kwe-supine -- ukutsheka kwesobunxele kwesobunxele uma ilele phansi.

source: JTS CPG: Orthopaedic Trauma / PHTLS / TCCC
